import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import"./LiveFeed.scss";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";let messageId=0;export const LiveFeed=()=>{const[messages,setMessages]=useState([]);const[isVisible,setIsVisible]=useState(true);useEffect(()=>{const handleEvent=event=>{const{username,figure,message,type,persistent}=event.detail;if(!message)return;const isPoliceCall=type==="[911]"&&persistent===true;const newMsg={id:messageId++,text:message,username,figure,isPoliceCall};setMessages(prev=>[...prev,newMsg]);// Auto-remove regular messages after 5 seconds
if(!isPoliceCall){setTimeout(()=>{setMessages(prev=>prev.filter(msg=>msg.id!==newMsg.id));},5000);}};window.addEventListener("live_feed_event",handleEvent);return()=>window.removeEventListener("live_feed_event",handleEvent);},[]);useEffect(()=>{const stored=localStorage.getItem("liveFeedEnabled");setIsVisible(stored===null||JSON.parse(stored)===true);const handleToggle=e=>{setIsVisible(e.detail.enabled);};window.addEventListener("toggleLiveFeed",handleToggle);return()=>window.removeEventListener("toggleLiveFeed",handleToggle);},[]);if(!isVisible)return null;const handleDismiss=id=>{setMessages(prev=>prev.filter(msg=>msg.id!==id));};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"live-feed-container",children:messages.map(msg=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`live-feed-message ${msg.isPoliceCall?"police-call":""}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{className:"avatar-head",src:`https://www.habbo.com/habbo-imaging/avatarimage?figure=${msg.figure}&direction=2&headonly=1&size=m`,alt:`${msg.username}'s avatar`}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:msg.username})," ",msg.text]}),msg.isPoliceCall&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"call-buttons",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"habbo-action-button green",onClick:()=>{console.log("Opening call for",msg.username);handleDismiss(msg.id);},children:"Open Call"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"habbo-action-button red",onClick:()=>handleDismiss(msg.id),children:"Decline"})]})]},msg.id))});};
